novel_features.name: Local SQLite Sync
novel_features.description: Mirror Oura usercollection data into a local SQLite store for offline search and analysis
novel_features.rationale: No competing tool offers a local data mirror; the popular wrappers are stateless API clients

novel_features.name: Full-Text Search
novel_features.description: FTS5 full-text search across locally synced Oura records
novel_features.rationale: Requires the local SQLite index; not offered by any existing Python/TS wrapper or thin CLI

novel_features.name: Local Analytics
novel_features.description: Aggregate group-by and count queries over locally synced health data
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with a local store populated from the API; absent from all alternatives

novel_features.name: Compound Workflows
novel_features.description: Chain multiple Oura API operations into one agent-friendly command
novel_features.rationale: Combines several usercollection calls behind a single invocation for agents

gaps.name: sync default resources
gaps.reason: defaultSyncResources is empty out of the box, so sync is a no-op until per-resource population is wired; the transcend layer (search/analytics) has no default data path until then

gaps.name: analytics examples
gaps.reason: scorecard insight scored 4/10; analytics ships generic placeholder examples that are not Oura-specific yet

gaps.name: webhook auth
gaps.reason: webhook subscription routes require a separate x-client-id + x-client-secret pair and are not part of the default OAuth-authenticated read surface

quickstart.description: List daily sleep summaries (score, contributors) as JSON
List daily readiness scores and contributors
Check CLI health and auth status

recipes.description: Fetch personal info (age, biological sex, height, weight)
